defs: The act of calling or summoning by a sacred name, or in solemn manner; the act of binding by an oath; an earnest entreaty; adjuration.
quotes: We charge you, in the name of God, take heed; . . . Under this conjuration speak, my lord.

defs: The act or process of invoking supernatural aid by the use of a magical form of words; the practice of magic arts; incantation; enchantment.
quotes: Pretended conjurations and prophecies of that event.

defs: A league for a criminal purpose; conspiracy.
